insights: Accumulates session-by-session execution records with timestamps and outcomes
Documents test counts, warning status, and next subtask dependencies
Serves as human-readable audit trail for verification steps
Captures detailed notes including test breakdown and subcommand results
Enables JSON serialization of progress for downstream tooling

patterns_discovered.description: make check enforces three sequential quality gates: cargo test, cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo fmt --check
patterns_discovered.significance: Prevents code merge with failing tests, clippy warnings, or format violations

patterns_discovered.description: Each subtask completion documents session number, execution details, and next subtask in a single commit
patterns_discovered.significance: Creates deterministic, reproducible workflow with clear handoff points

patterns_discovered.description: Detailed breakdown of test counts by subsystem (323+10+17+4+1+91+1 = 447 total)
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables regression detection across distributed test suites in a monorepo workspace

patterns_discovered.description: Both build-progress.txt (human) and implementation_plan.json (machine) updated in same commit
patterns_discovered.significance: Maintains consistency between audit log and task manifest

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: 447 tests is a large verification surface
gotchas_discovered.context: Each test run must complete without failures for gate to pass
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Session 4 completed in reasonable time; no timeout issues observed

gotchas_discovered.context: Any clippy lint classified as warning will fail the gate
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clean result indicates mature codebase with strong lint discipline

gotchas_discovered.context: Indicates conditional or platform-specific test that is intentionally skipped
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Documented but not blocking; acceptable pattern for conditional test suites

approach_outcome.execution_summary: make check executed and passed all three verification stages
approach_outcome.clippy_results: No warnings found with -D warnings enforcement
approach_outcome.format_check_results: All code meets cargo fmt standard
approach_outcome.next_subtask: subtask-1-7 - Write output/result.md documenting the test outcome

recommendations.recommendation: Document the comprehensive test breakdown in result.md
recommendations.rationale: 447 tests with 447 passing demonstrates strong coverage; explicitly call out the 7-crate distribution

recommendations.recommendation: Note the clippy zero-warning status in output
recommendations.rationale: Enforced via -D flag; signals mature code quality discipline

recommendations.recommendation: Investigate the 1 ignored test if not previously documented
recommendations.rationale: Clarify whether it is platform-specific, flaky, or intentionally skipped pending a future fix

recommendations.recommendation: Maintain dual-file sync pattern in subtask-1-7
recommendations.rationale: Ensures both human audit trail (build-progress.txt) and machine manifest (implementation_plan.json) stay consistent
